text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for my tardiness! I left one of my
books behind, and I had to run back to get it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No worries. Watch your step when you board,
there's quite a gap.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I will! Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, let's see... One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Okay, looks like everyone's here! We're good to
go, driver!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, this year's summer camp comes to
an end!
